query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A remote control lies on a perforated surface with rows of vertical slots. Visible on the remote are a circular directional pad, several buttons, and printed symbols. At the bottom of the frame, a narrow panel shows four rounded buttons arranged in a row. The image is monochrome.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monochrome image with heavy analog-style grain and extreme contrast that crushes large areas into solid black. A remote control rests diagonally on a perforated surface with rows of vertical slots, cropped aggressively at the top and right edges so that much of the device is cut off. Visible portions include a circular directional pad, several buttons, and printed markings that partially dissolve into the surrounding darkness. A narrow panel with four rounded buttons sits along the bottom edge. The skewed framing, tight cropping, and oppressive shadows create an informal, lo-fi composition.
